headline: Bump jansu-embedded rev to pick up the upstream J-4 Consumer batch-tail redelivery fix (jansu PR #11 commit 9f61c0d). Revert the J-4 workaround in jansu_consumer_resumes_after_restart.rs back to exact-sequence assertion.
